nasb.text: and their forty sockets of silver; two sockets under one board and two sockets under another board.

esv.text: and their forty bases of silver, two bases under one frame, and two bases under the next frame.

cnv.text: 和四十個銀插座。這塊木板底下有兩個插座，那塊木板底下也有兩個插座。

ccb.text: 这些木板下面也要装上四十个带凹槽的银底座，每块木板下面有两个银底座。
